response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of broad full-stack experience with genuine high-throughput systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic) and a strong testing culture, but the core competencies this role demands — experimentation frameworks, A/B testing infrastructure, telemetry pipelines, feature flagging systems, and growth measurement platforms — are entirely absent from the resume. The seniority trajectory peaks at Staff-level at a small agency rather than the Principal/IC6 depth and cross-org influence the role requires, and there is no evidence of the statistical analysis, bias detection, or rollout-risk management experience called out in the preferred qualifications.
strengths: Proven high-scale systems engineering at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests/second using async I/O and low-latency patterns
Broad multi-language proficiency spanning TypeScript, C/C++, Java, and DLang, covering several of the role's required languages
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, demonstrating current relevance to the AI-tools-for-velocity preferred qualification
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment, bias detection, or rollout-risk management mentioned anywhere
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background — no instrumentation pipelines, observability platforms, or statistical analysis work evident in 15+ years of history
Does not appear to operate at Principal/IC6 scope — most roles are individual-contributor Senior/Staff at small-to-mid companies with limited cross-team architecture ownership

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. Principal IC6 scope
